message:
fix: correct mouse coordinate mapping for Chrome viewport

- Use Chrome's actual window.innerWidth/Height instead of screencast
  metadata, which can differ (e.g., Google 995x1088 vs frame 896x980)
- Add floating-point math with rounding to avoid sub-pixel errors
- Implement lazy-cache for viewport queries (only on navigation/resize)
- Add frame change ratio adjustment for download bar appearance
- Pass actual content height to mapper instead of terminal-calculated
- Reset viewport cache on frameNavigated, loadEventFired, and resize
- Use display_pixel_width for X coordinate mapping

Fixes mouse hover requiring offset on sites like Google while
maintaining correct behavior on sites like ghostty.org.
